meaning: n.年少者,晚辈,下级,(年龄、职位等)较低者,大学三年级学生adj.年少的,下级的,后进的
examples: She's his junior by four years.
He dropped out of junior high school.
Junior nurses usually work alongside more senior nurses.
He jumped from Morgan Stanley and recruited four junior executives from other firms to join him.
That job will fall to Hayek Junior, who is about to pick up the title of ceo.
